sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107731" key="u(pe/roinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπέροινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107731.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">immoderately fond of wine,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:8:25:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.25.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
